message:
test(wal): add 9 proptest telemetry counter invariants for WalEngine [ft-3kxe.16]

Add property-based tests covering: appends exact count, checkpoints exact count,
compaction accuracy, truncation accuracy, zero-initialization, monotonic counters,
cross-counter bounds, and snapshot serde roundtrip. All 49 tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
